condition: special cargo and transit airport capability unknown
recommended_action: Check Block C transit capability or choose direct route.

condition: LHO/SHL/QRT cargo with more than one transit
recommended_action: Prefer direct route or one secure short transit with confirmed handover.

condition: temperature cargo with unknown transit cold storage or container runtime
recommended_action: Confirm cold storage at every transit and active/passive container runtime.

condition: CAO cargo but no confirmed freighter/all-cargo leg
SCO security cargo routed on passenger aircraft
recommended_action: Use all-cargo aircraft or resolve security status.

condition: passenger aircraft selected but cargo security not SPX/equivalent
recommended_action: Screen/secure cargo or switch to eligible route.

condition: PLACI-regulated lane but advance cargo data incomplete
recommended_action: Complete shipper, consignee, description, pieces, weight, AWB/HAWB and route data.

condition: large cargo and aircraft type/ULD unknown on one or more legs
recommended_action: Run Block E aircraft/ULD fit for every leg.

condition: route exists but booking/capacity status unknown
recommended_action: Mark route as plausible only; require carrier/forwarder capacity confirmation.
Escalate to carrier/handler and recalculate ETA/routing.
